w2:textbox.label: 1. 보험료 간편 심사 및 알릴의무
w2:textbox.style: font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 2px solid #2c3e50; padding-bottom: 5px;

xf:group.style: margin-bottom: 30px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px; background-color: #f8f9fa;

xf:trigger.style: width: 80px; height: 28px; background-color: #0d6efd; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 3px; font-weight: bold;
xf:trigger.xf:label: 심사실행

w2:textbox.label: 최근 1년 내 의사 진찰 이력이 있습니까?

xf:group.style: display:none; margin-top: 15px; border: 1px solid #ced4da; padding: 15px; background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 4px;

xf:trigger.style: width: 90px; height: 26px; margin-bottom: 10px; background-color: #198754; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 3px;
xf:trigger.xf:label: + 이력추가

xf:trigger.style: width: 90px; height: 26px; background-color: #dc3545; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 3px; font-weight: bold;
xf:trigger.xf:label: 질병 저장

xf:group.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 10px;

xf:trigger.style: width: 70px; height: 26px; background-color: #6c757d; color: white; border: none;
xf:trigger.xf:label: 조회

xf:trigger.style: width: 80px; height: 26px; background-color: #0dcaf0; color: white; border: none;
xf:trigger.xf:label: 일괄심사

xf:trigger.style: width: 100px; height: 26px; background-color: #198754; color: white; border: none; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer;
xf:trigger.xf:label: 엑셀 다운로드

xf:trigger.style: width: 70px; height: 26px; background-color: #ffc107; color: black; border: none; font-weight: bold;
xf:trigger.xf:label: 저장

xf:group.style: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 10px;

xf:trigger.style: width: 90px; height: 26px; background-color: #6c757d; color: white; border: none;
xf:trigger.xf:label: 전체 조회

xf:group.style: display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-top: 15px; gap: 10px;
